result.stdout:
Usage: EC.JsonToCSharp [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                       Show help information
  -ns|--namespace<optionvalue>       Provides the path if the file that contains the json content needing to be converted to DotNet Classes.
  -json|--jsonfilepath<optionvalue>  Provides the path if the file that contains the json content needing to be converted to DotNet Classes.
  -cs|--csfilepath<optionvalue>      Provides the path if the file should contains the DotNet Classes.
  -cl|--className<optionvalue>       Provides the class name for the root object in the json.

commands.payload:
Usage: EC.JsonToCSharp [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                       Show help information
  -ns|--namespace<optionvalue>       Provides the path if the file that contains the json content needing to be converted to DotNet Classes.
  -json|--jsonfilepath<optionvalue>  Provides the path if the file that contains the json content needing to be converted to DotNet Classes.
  -cs|--csfilepath<optionvalue>      Provides the path if the file should contains the DotNet Classes.
  -cl|--className<optionvalue>       Provides the class name for the root object in the json.
